title: Cross-Verification Audit of Paper Numerical Claims Against Source Experiments
summary: Demo notebook for the cross-verification audit of paper numerical claims against source experiments. Loads a curated subset of 28 claims (covering MATCH, STALE, MISMATCH, and UNVERIFIABLE statuses across diverse regex patterns and paper sections). Demonstrates the type-specific comparison logic (1% relative for floats, exact for integers, order-of-magnitude for p-values), per-section accuracy analysis across 15 sections, cross-section consistency checking for 8 key metrics, and correction recommendations. Includes 4-panel visualization: status distribution pie chart, per-section accuracy bars, stacked status bars, and consistency check heatmap.
